title: veridict matrix report
description: JSON output of `veridict matrix`. Report-only (no overall verdict) - a matrix isn't a single pass/fail. Covers both star-graph (legacy files only) and general-graph (--matches present) modes; see docs/metrics.md for when each applies.

schema_version.description: Stays 1 across additive changes; bumps only when a field is removed or renamed.

matrix.description: Upper triangle only (baseline first if present, then candidates in input order).

ci_low.description: Some (real Wilson CI) in star-graph mode. null in general-graph mode - a joint CI for a jointly-fit rating is not approximated here.

component.description: Mutually-comparable group id. Always 0 in star-graph mode. Two candidates in different components have no finite Bradley-Terry comparison.

elo_diff.description: Row's Elo advantage over col (reverse direction is -elo_diff). null only for disconnected cells - no finite estimate exists, not merely an uncertain one.

direct.description: true iff status == "direct". Kept alongside status for backward compatibility.
